title: Imprisoned
body:
Imprisoned

Imprisoned is a mod that makes creating prisons ultra-secure and much smaller! This project was inspired by Neon Void, hoping to motivate people to continue the prison with this new mod to make it even more secure and easier to make!

Blocks

Imprisoned adds many new indestructible blocks, as well as a tool to destroy any block.

Universal Block Remover

Crafting recipe: - Can destroy any block with right click

Compresser

Crafting recipe: - Can compress blocks in a 3x3 grid above it into one block

Lightener

Crafting recipe: - Can make blocks moveable by pistons Check gallery for the other blocks, which are all formed from the Compressor Credits: - Mcreator - Neon void - Kenadian - Me
